title: AI / ML Research
description: Research-oriented path into machine learning and AI. Heavy math, best runway to grad school, research labs, and cutting-edge industry roles.
why_this_hint: If you're drawn to how machines learn from data — or you want to go to grad school — this path starts with low-barrier clubs and builds toward paid summer research.

title: Cybersecurity
description: Hands-on path in offensive and defensive security. CTF competitions, systems knowledge, and a strong pipeline to security internships and industry roles.
why_this_hint: If breaking and defending systems sounds more exciting than building them, start with ACM Cyber's weekly CTF sessions — no prior experience needed.
sample_downstream: Play first CTF — picoCTF warmup track

title: Full-Stack + Industry
description: Build-first path focused on shipping products and landing software engineering internships. Lower research ceiling, faster job market entry.
why_this_hint: If you want to ship things people actually use — and get a SWE internship by junior year — this path runs from club projects straight into recruiting season.
sample_downstream: Join ACM Hack — ship an app in a quarter
Prep SWE recruiting at the UCLA Career Center

title: I'm not sure yet — help me explore
description: Not sure which direction to go? Walk three futures in parallel: AI/ML research, cybersecurity, and full-stack product — see which one pulls you in.
why_this_hint: The best next move when you're undecided isn't picking one path — it's taking one low-cost step on each so the right one becomes obvious.
sample_downstream: Email an AI lab PI for a 15-min tour
Attend ACM AI or ACM Cyber first meeting
